Section 1. Synthetic long-form legal text for smoke verification of full mirror caching. Clause 1.1 confirms that the extracted body must be stored in full. Clause 1.2 repeats operational language about intake, evidence batches, opponent filings, and index refresh. Clause 1.3 adds enough detail for many pages of text-layer output so the mirror check compares a large OCR artifact against the stored markdown body. Clause 1.4 states that the mirror remains a cache of the source document and does not replace the legal original.

Clause 2.3 adds enough detail for many pages of text-layer output so the mirror check compares a large OCR artifact against the stored markdown body. Clause 2.4 states that the mirror remains a cache of the source document and does not replace the legal original.

Clause 274.4 states that the mirror remains a cache of the source document and does not replace the legal original.
